judge_reason: Both agree there is a newspaper clipping about flying saucers with a headline and typed text, but description B adds specific headline and article details while description A mentions a handwritten note not seen by B.
original_image_tags: A newspaper clipping is stapled to the left side of the page. A handwritten note in the left margin reads "O Flying Saucers".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned archival document page with a pasted newspaper clipping titled “Mystery Objects Called Mirage by Astronomer,” plus typed distribution/checklist fields, handwritten initials, and date stamps on the right side and bottom.*
